seoTitle: East Kurrajong vs East Lismore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Kurrajong and East Lismore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Kurrajong vs East Lismore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Kurrajong and East Lismore.
heading: East Kurrajong vs East Lismore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Kurrajong, New South Wales and East Lismore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Kurrajong has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to East Lismore (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Kurrajong or East Lismore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Kurrajong has a flood risk score of 41/100, while East Lismore scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Kurrajong scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. East Lismore scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Kurrajong or East Lismore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Kurrajong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
